name: Multi-slice implementation
input: A spec has five slices, two independent and one red gate.
expected_behavior: Chooses independent work safely, verifies each pass, updates handoff, and does not stop after the first green slice.

name: QEC slice discovers bad assumption
input: During implementation the detector semantics differ from the plan.
expected_behavior: Stops broadening the patch, updates/reslices the spec, records the deviation, and verifies with QEC evidence.

name: Scratch leak
input: After a GPU pass, debug scripts and profiling dumps remain in the tree.
expected_behavior: Identifies scratch artifacts, deletes or promotes them to evidence, and keeps the commit focused.
